name: sashamarchuk-plugins
description: Sasha Marchuk's Claude Code plugins — opinionated tooling for ticket management, automation, and everyday engineering workflows.

plugins.name: clickup
plugins.description: Universal /clickup skill for creating and managing ClickUp tickets with enforced quality standards — Connextra user stories, evidence-only descriptions, fuzzy list aliases, first-name teammate resolution, duplicate detection, idempotent create, and a two-step onboarding wizard.

plugins.name: ultra
plugins.description: Provides /ultra:run (and /ultra:resume) — multi-agent swarm with adversarial validation, structured debates, devil's advocate, and anti-AI-slop checks. Always invoked as /ultra:run (never bare /ultra). Supports tiers (--small/--medium/--large/--xl), multi-terminal coordination, and wrapping other skills.

plugins.name: ultra-analyzer
plugins.description: (beta) Rigorous pipeline analyzer. Discover → Analyze → Validate → Synthesize, with resume-able state and /ultra:run validation gates at critical boundaries. Source-agnostic: MongoDB, filesystem, PDF corpora, web scrapes, logs, JSON/CSV. Requires the `ultra` plugin from this same marketplace.

plugins.name: gevent
plugins.description: Universal /gevent skill for scheduling, updating, and cancelling Google Calendar events with Google Meet — always attaches a configurable notes bot, conflict detection, past-time guard, two-step onboarding (identity + calendar defaults). Reads teammates from ~/.claude/shared/identity.json, the same file the `clickup` plugin uses, so names resolve the same way in both.

plugins.name: claude-migrate
plugins.description: (beta) Universal Claude-to-Claude account migrator. Parse a Claude.ai data export (or extract live from the old account) -> deterministically score each chat's value -> you confirm what migrates -> distill every kept chat into one paste-ready first message -> re-create projects and seed chats in the new account. Always builds a byte-exact, self-contained copy page (zero tooling, the reliable floor); when a pre-authenticated browser is reachable it also runs confirmation-gated automation (seed -> await OK -> rename, then strips the onboarding instruction). Resume-able state machine with /ultra gates. Requires the `ultra` plugin from this same marketplace.
